description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting wilderness of Yakushima, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its ancient cedar trees, lush forests, and breathtaking landscapes. This 3-day adventure is designed for those who crave the thrill of hiking and the serenity of nature, as you explore the mystical moss-covered forests and stand in awe of the majestic Jomon Sugi, one of the oldest trees in the world. Get ready for an unforgettable journey filled with adventure and natural beauty, perfect for you and your friends!

activities.description: Arrive at Yakushima Airport, where the lush greenery and fresh air greet you. Take a moment to soak in the beauty of this UNESCO World Heritage site before heading out for your adventure.
Start your journey with a hike through the enchanting Moss Forest. The vibrant green moss covering the trees creates a magical atmosphere, perfect for photography and immersing yourself in nature.
Enjoy a hearty lunch at a local eatery, where you can savor Yakushima's fresh seafood and local specialties. Don't miss the chance to try the famous Yakushima pork!

Embark on a challenging hike to Jomon Sugi, the ancient cedar tree estimated to be over 7,000 years old. The trek is demanding but offers breathtaking views and a sense of accomplishment upon reaching this natural wonder.
After a long day of hiking, return to your accommodation to relax and refresh. Enjoy the serene surroundings of Yakushima as you unwind from your adventures.
End your day with dinner at a cozy izakaya, where you can enjoy a variety of local dishes and drinks. Share stories of your day's adventures with your friends in a warm and inviting atmosphere.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a cozy café in Yakushima, enjoying local specialties like sweet potato pancakes and fresh fruit. This will fuel you for the adventurous hike ahead!

Embark on an exhilarating hike to Jomon Sugi, the ancient cedar tree that is over 7,000 years old. The trail takes you through lush forests filled with moss-covered trees and vibrant flora, offering breathtaking views along the way.
Enjoy a packed lunch at a mountain hut along the trail, surrounded by the serene beauty of nature. Take a moment to relax and recharge before continuing your hike.
After lunch, continue your hike to reach the majestic Jomon Sugi. The sight of this ancient tree is awe-inspiring, and you'll have plenty of opportunities to take stunning photos.

After visiting Jomon Sugi, head to Shiratani Unsuikyo, a beautiful area known for its enchanting mossy forests and scenic trails. This is a perfect spot for photography and immersing yourself in nature.

activities.activity: Return hike to the starting point
activities.description: Begin your descent back to the trailhead, taking in the serene atmosphere of the forest as you reflect on the day's adventure. Keep an eye out for wildlife along the way!
End your day with a delicious dinner at a local izakaya, where you can savor fresh seafood and traditional Yakushima dishes. It's the perfect way to unwind after a long day of hiking.
Return to your accommodation to relax and recharge for the next day's adventures. Enjoy the peaceful ambiance of Yakushima as you reflect on your incredible day.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a local café, enjoying fresh pastries and coffee to fuel your adventure ahead.

Embark on an exhilarating hike to Jomon Sugi, the ancient cedar tree that is over 7,000 years old. The trail offers stunning views of the lush forest and unique flora, making it a must-see for nature lovers.
Enjoy a packed lunch by the Anbo River, surrounded by the serene sounds of nature. Take a moment to relax and recharge before continuing your exploration.
After lunch, venture into the enchanting Moss Forest. The vibrant green moss covering the trees creates a magical atmosphere, perfect for photography and appreciating the beauty of nature.
Begin your return hike to the trailhead, taking in the sights and sounds of the forest one last time. Keep an eye out for local wildlife along the way!
Head to Yakushima Airport for your departure. Reflect on the incredible experiences and breathtaking landscapes you've encountered during your stay.
